DAMPERS AT ALL N-ACCESSABLE CEILING LOCATIONS.
DUCT DIMENSIONS ON PLAN ARE SHEET METAL SZE.
ALL CEILING DIFFUSER RETURN AIR REGISTER CEILING BOXES SHALL BE OF SUFFICIENT HEIGHT TO
PERMIT SIDE INLET CONNECTIONS WHEN ATTACHED TO BRANCH DUCTS. OR FULL SIZE VERTICAL
PLENUMS WHEN CONNECTED DIRECTLY OFF BOTTOM OF SA OR RA MAINS. SUCH CEILING BOXES AND
VERTICAL PLENUMS SHALL BE LINED W,' l" THICK NFBU RATED DUCT LINER WITH FLAT BLACK FACING.
CONNECTION TO SIDEWALL SUPPLY REGISTERS SHALL BE MADE WITH FULL SIZE HORIZONTAL PLENUM
EXTENS06 FROM MAIN SUPPLY DUCT. LINED OR WRAPPED AT CONTRACTORS OPTION
CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE ALL CONTROL ACCESSORIES AND COORDINATE WITH ALL TRADES AND PROVIDE

STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE-WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT. THE SLOPE OF THE HORIZONTAL DUCT
SHALL NOT BE LESS THAN THE MANUFACTURER'S INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION (SLOPE SHALL BE 1/16"
PER LINEAR FOOT FOR HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN LESS THAN 75'. AND 3/16' PER LINEAR FOOT FOR
HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN MORE THAN 75': PER CAPTIVEAIRE DOUBLE WALL GREASE EXHAUST AIR DUCT
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION) TOWARD THE HOOD OR TOWARD THE APPROVED GREASE RESERVOIR.
